_comment: Village Elder — First Conversation | Phase: 2 | Context: Village Hub | The elder gives one of many conflicting stories about Kael's parents.

scenes.speaker: Elder Maren
scenes.text: Kael. You're awake early. The nightmares again?

options.text: Yes. I keep seeing fire and shadows.

scenes.speaker: Elder Maren
scenes.text: Dreams are the mind's way of holding onto what it cannot understand. They will pass, child.

scenes.speaker: Elder Maren
scenes.text: Your parents... they died protecting something important. That is all anyone knows.

scenes.speaker: Elder Maren
scenes.text: Some truths are heavier than a child should carry. When you're older, perhaps.
